params.name: The Resurrection
params.description:
On April 28, 1944, Allied artillery adjusted bombing coordinates to spare the fresco.
This revolutionary fresco combines linear perspective with divine drama: Christ, vertically rising from a sarcophagus, forms a geometric cross with the horizontal Roman soldiers.
